TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay nqu tay , Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw United arab emirates ta' misuw hya' ga Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~…ēa taj nqu taj , kńßali*a ő≤in zaje* al nańßjan, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw unite* araő≤ emirates~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a kńßali*a ő≤in zaje* al nańßjan, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: ryax sa tay nqu tay , Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1948) mrhuw United arab emirates ta' misuw hya' ga Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, aring ryax tay 3 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
